tasks.description: Initialize project with package.json and vite.config.js for Electron + Vite bundler
tasks.acceptance: npm run dev launches Electron with renderer window; contextIsolation:true, nodeIntegration:false confirmed; electron-store added as devDependency for window geometry persistence

tasks.description: Create main process (src/main/main.js) with Electron window, network blocking, clipboard IPC handlers, and window geometry persistence via electron-store
tasks.acceptance: Window no white flash; all network requests blocked; navigation prevented; clipboard:read and clipboard:write IPC registered; window geometry saved/restored between sessions; sandbox:true (clipboard API accessible via preload); network block events logged to console (dev mode only, no persistent file logging in production)

tasks.description: Create preload script (src/main/preload.js) exposing electronAPI with readClipboard and writeClipboard via contextBridge
tasks.acceptance: window.electronAPI.readClipboard() and writeClipboard(text) available in renderer; no Node APIs exposed; non-string write returns false; sandbox:true compatible

tasks.description: Create character substitution map (src/sanitizer/charmap.js) — ordered CHARMAP array of [unicode, ascii] tuples covering smart quotes, dashes, ellipsis, spaces, invisible chars, symbols, fractions, superscripts, ligatures, arrows, math operators
tasks.acceptance: File exports CHARMAP; every entry is [string, string]; no undefined/null replacements; ES module importable in Node and browser

tasks.description: Create sanitizer engine (src/sanitizer/sanitizer.js) — pure JS pipeline: CHARMAP substitutions → NFKC normalization → whitespace normalization → zero-width strip → C0/C1 control removal → CRLF normalization → final ASCII strip
tasks.acceptance: sanitize(str) returns {text, changes}; all output chars in [\x09\x0A\x0D\x20-\x7E]; empty array changes for clean input; 50k-char in <50ms; pure ES module

tasks.description: Write sanitizer unit tests (tests/sanitizer.test.js) — minimum 60 cases covering every CHARMAP entry, NFKC, whitespace, invisible chars, edge cases, fixture test
tasks.acceptance: npm test exits 0; zero skipped tests; 100% CHARMAP coverage; performance assertion for 50k-char <50ms; output purity regex verified

tasks.description: Create app shell (src/renderer/index.html) — two-pane layout, header with clear button, input/output textareas, center action column with Sanitize button, status bar, toast notification
tasks.acceptance: HTML matches scaffold spec with all IDs, ARIA labels, CSP meta tag

tasks.description: Create CSS styles (src/renderer/styles/reset.css and app.css) — dark theme, design tokens, two-pane layout, button variants, status bar, toast, scrollbars
tasks.acceptance: CSS matches scaffold spec exactly; all design tokens applied; layout at 960x560, 700x420, 1280x800 without breakage

tasks.description: Create app logic (src/renderer/app.js) — sanitize on click, clipboard paste/read/write, clear, char counters, keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Shift+S/C/X), toast notifications
tasks.acceptance: All buttons functional; shortcuts work; auto-sanitize after paste; copy button disabled until first sanitize; toast auto-dismisses

tasks.description: Add startup optimizations to main.js — disable background-networking, default-apps, extensions, sync, metrics, first-run, safebrowsing; set NODE_ENV=production in electron-builder extraMetadata
tasks.acceptance: App window appears within 3s on 4GB RAM/HDD; CPU <5% within 2s of show; memory <150MB idle; NODE_ENV=production in builds; no DevTools in prod; network blocker confirmed active

tasks.description: Create electron-builder.config.js — appId gov.mil.clipsanitizer, output to dist/, win target nsis+portable for x64+ia32, asInvoker execution level, NSIS allowChangeDir, portable artifact naming
tasks.acceptance: npm run build produces 4 artifacts (NSIS x64/ia32, portable x64/ia32); NSIS no UAC prompt; portable runs from USB; no Squirrel update check

tasks.description: Create test fixtures — tests/fixtures/word-sample.txt (Word-generated content with smart chars) and tests/fixtures/word-sample.clean.txt (expected sanitized output); fixture test in sanitizer.test.js asserts byte-for-byte match
tasks.acceptance: Fixture test passes; word-sample.txt content preserved with Unicode; word-sample.clean.txt matches expected sanitized output byte-for-byte

tasks.description: Create Electron smoke tests (tests/smoke.test.js) — launch app, verify window opens, verify clipboard IPC works, verify network blocking active, verify keyboard shortcuts registered
tasks.acceptance: npm test smoke exits 0; all smoke assertions pass; app launches without errors; clipboard read/write verified; network block confirmed; no console errors
